scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.json && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const path=require('path'); const src=path.join(process.cwd(),'scripts'); const dst=path.join(process.cwd(),'dist','scripts'); fs.mkdirSync(dst,{recursive:true}); for (const name of fs.readdirSync(src)) { if (!name.endsWith('.py')) continue; fs.copyFileSync(path.join(src,name), path.join(dst,name)); }"
